'''Pelko bugs''' were small creatures that were covered in millions of microscopic barbs that delivered a paralytic, blistering toxin which could penetrate armor. They lived only beneath sands of the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], and were attracted to [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]]. They would stalk and swarm their prey in the darkness. The bug's attunement to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] allowed them to determine if a creature was suitable prey, as [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] found when exploring the Valley, in which they found he was too powerful and did not attack. The barbs were used in [[Sith training saber|training sabers]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] because of the toxin's effects, which mimicked the effects of losing a limb to a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
"Pelko" means "fear" in [[Wikipedia:Finnish language|Finnish]].
